description: Model an M8 countersunk bolt based on a half-profile with vertices at (0,0), (8,0), (8,-2), (4,-6), (4,-36), and (0,-36) revolved 360 degrees around the vertical axis. Create a hexagonal Allen key socket on the top face (centered at origin, 3.0 mm radius) with a depth of 3.5 mm. Save the model to /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/countersunk_bolt.slvs and export the STL to /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/countersunk_bolt.stl.
